## Verification Plan

1. [ ] All acceptance criteria from state.yaml satisfied
2. [ ] Assigned skills were respected in execution
3. [ ] Integration with completed tasks verified
4. [ ] Orchestrator state.yaml updated with results

## Orchestrator Sync

After parallel execution completes:
1. Update `.orchestrator/state.yaml` — mark tasks as completed
2. Create checkpoint in `.orchestrator/checkpoints/`
3. Update `.orchestrator/CONTEXT.md` with execution summary
4. If all tasks complete → transition phase to "review"
